scripts.apply:staging: npm run env:staging && npm run apply
scripts.apply:production: npm run env:production && npm run apply
scripts.apply:all: npm run apply:production && npm run apply:staging
scripts.domains:staging: npm run env:staging && sh -c 'echo "== staging domains =="; for s in api app admin www; do echo "-- $s"; railway domain list --service "$s" --json; done'
scripts.domains:production: npm run env:production && sh -c 'echo "== production domains =="; for s in api app admin www; do echo "-- $s"; railway domain list --service "$s" --json; done'
scripts.domains:all: npm run domains:production && npm run domains:staging
scripts.plan:staging: npm run env:staging && npm run plan
scripts.plan:production: npm run env:production && npm run plan
scripts.plan:all: npm run plan:production && npm run plan:staging
